BENE_MDCR_STUS_CD 
LABEL: 
Beneficiary Medicare Status Code 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies how a beneficiary qualifies for Medicare benefits as of a particular date.

LONG NAME: BENE_MDCR_STUS_CD

CHAR
